---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for iVZA
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. What limitation or pain point are you experiencing?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as possible about the expected behavior, API surface, or configuration changes.

## API Sketch

If applicable, provide a rough sketch of how the feature would be used.

```rust
// Rust API example
```

```typescript
// TypeScript SDK example
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they are insufficient.

## Affected Components

Which parts of the system would this feature touch?

- [ ] Core engine (graph, analyzer, scheduler, execution)
- [ ] On-chain program
- [ ] TypeScript SDK
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or supporting material for this feature request.
